name: tokenpak-claude-code
description: Extends Claude Code with token-aware context packing, semantic search, and file-path intelligence backed by the tokenpak open-source library.

tokenpak_proxy_url.title: Proxy URL
tokenpak_proxy_url.description: URL of the tokenpak proxy server. Leave default if running the proxy locally.

vault_root.title: Vault Root
vault_root.description: Absolute path to your vault root directory. Leave empty to skip vault-aware features.

enable_telemetry_hook.title: Enable Telemetry Hook
enable_telemetry_hook.description: Enable the telemetry hook to log tool usage locally. If proxy URL is set, events are also POSTed there. Opt-out at any time.

enable_validation_hook.title: Enable Validation Hook
enable_validation_hook.description: Enable the post-edit validation hook. Opt-in feature that validates edits against schema constraints. Adds latency.

license_key.title: License Key
license_key.description: tokenpak Pro license key. Required for Pro-tier features. Contact tokenpak for a key.
